query:
SELECT o.id as offreId, o.titre, o.employeurId, e.id as empId, e.userId, e.nomEntreprise, u.id as userId, u.name, u.email, u.role
FROM offresEmploi o
JOIN employeurs e ON o.employeurId = e.id
JOIN users u ON e.userId = u.id
ORDER BY o.id;
